'''"Totally Patriotic"''' was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by the anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Band/Legends|band]] [[Red Shift Limit/Legends|Red Shift Limit]] and the title track from their [[Totally Patriotic (Red Shift Limit album)|album of the same name]]. The album was Red Shift Limit's latest release in the period of [[Time/Legends|time]]<ref name="GG9" /> between the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' is set in the [[Time/Legends|time period]] between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Those battles are dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively, by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', which also establishes the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] as the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref>

"Totally Patriotic" was a new rendition of a [[Totally Patriotic (The Emperor's New Clothes song)|song with the same title]] by the pro-Imperial band [[The Emperor's New Clothes]]. Red Shift Limit's version was completely different from the original song; the band changed its intended meaning entirely.<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Totally Patriotic" was mentioned in the [[1993]] reference book ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]].<ref name="GG9" />
